title: ornithogalum strangwaysii
intro: Ornithogalum strangwaysii is a plant species, commonly known as the Cape Star of Bethlehem or Strangways' starflower. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ornithogalum strangwaysii are attributed to its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are often dried and ground into a powder, or made into teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
